keyPoints: Feature Engineering: Selecting the most relevant features that improve model performance
Feature Engineering: Scaling/Normalizing features to prevent dominance by high-value features
Feature Engineering: Encoding categorical variables into numerical variables
Dimensionality Reduction: PCA (Principal Component Analysis) - Reduces features to uncorrelated components
Dimensionality Reduction: t-SNE (t-Distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding) - Visualizes high-dimensional data in lower dimensions
Dimensionality Reduction: LLE (Local Linear Embedding) - Preserves local structure of data
Dimensionality Reduction: Autoencoders - Learns compact representation of data
Dimensionality Reduction: Truncated SVD (Singular Value Decomposition) - Reduces features to most informative components
